description: Flow Video Download Skill — Complete Guide (2026-03-02)

download_via_gcs_url.ps1.content:
# Flow Video Download via GCS URL (Proven Method)
# Usage: .\download_via_gcs_url.ps1 -GcsUrl "<url>" -OutFile "<path>"

param(
    [Parameter(Mandatory=$true)]
    [string]$GcsUrl,
    
    [Parameter(Mandatory=$true)]
    [string]$OutFile
)

Write-Host "Downloading from GCS..."
Invoke-WebRequest -Uri $GcsUrl -OutFile $OutFile -UseBasicParsing

$size = (Get-Item $OutFile).Length
Write-Host "DOWNLOADED: $size bytes ($([math]::Round($size/1MB,2)) MB)"

$header = Get-Content $OutFile -Encoding Byte -TotalCount 12
$isMp4 = [System.Text.Encoding]::ASCII.GetString($header[4..7]) -eq 'ftyp'
Write-Host "MP4_VALID: $isMp4"

if (-not $isMp4) {
    throw "File is not valid MP4!"
}

Write-Host "SUCCESS: Video ready at $OutFile"

inspect_mp4.py.content:
#!/usr/bin/env python
"""
Flow Video Media Inspector
Usage: python inspect_mp4.py <path-to-mp4>
"""

import sys
from pathlib import Path

try:
    from mutagen import File
except ImportError:
    print("ERROR: mutagen not installed. Run: pip install mutagen")
    sys.exit(1)

def inspect_mp4(file_path: str):
    file = File(file_path)
    if file is None:
        print(f"ERROR: Cannot read {file_path}")
        return False
    
    print(f"FILE={file_path}")
    print(f"SIZE={Path(file_path).stat().st_size}")
    print(f"TRACKS={len(file.mime)}")
    
    has_video = False
    has_audio = False
    duration = 0.0
    
    if hasattr(file, 'info'):
        if hasattr(file.info, 'length'):
            duration = file.info.length
        
        if hasattr(file.info, 'bitrate'):
            print(f"BITRATE={file.info.bitrate}")
    
    for mime in file.mime:
        if 'video' in mime:
            has_video = True
        if 'audio' in mime:
            has_audio = True
    
    print(f"TRACK_1_TYPE={'vide' if has_video else 'unkn'}")
    print(f"TRACK_1_DURATION_SEC={duration}")
    print(f"TRACK_2_TYPE={'soun' if has_audio else 'unkn'}")
    print(f"TRACK_2_DURATION_SEC={duration}")
    print(f"HAS_VIDEO={has_video}")
    print(f"HAS_AUDIO={has_audio}")
    
    return has_video and has_audio

if __name__ == "__main__":
    if len(sys.argv) != 2:
        print("Usage: python inspect_mp4.py <path-to-mp4>")
        sys.exit(1)
    
    result = inspect_mp4(sys.argv[1])
    sys.exit(0 if result else 1)
